_comment: Jedi guild layer for 3s. Like Necromancers, this guild has NO private MIP tag - vitals ride the mud-wide FFF composite feed (A=hp C=sp E=gp1 G=gp2). Maxes self-calibrate from peak observed value. Cascade rule REPLACE (character file wins).
Pool labels: HP/SP verified from score; Energy, GP2 still GUESSED (value didn't echo to a named gscore line) - rename live.
Attack: Single-target attack; '{t}' = parsed mob keyword. Area variant in-game is 'focus force taunt for all'.
